title: Mrcool's Grenades
description: A mod that adds new explosive weapons
body:
Mrcool's Grenades is a mod that adds grenades to minecraft (Currently just the chaos grenade though)
Chaos Grenade:
The ultimate weapon, so powerful that you will probably die when detonating it
In Creative Mode it blasts you into the air!

Be warned though, this thing creates a massive blast crater which can break into your house
